title: Senior Financial Analyst - Muthoot Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Muthoot Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Muthoot Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Muthoot Finance:
Muthoot Finance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Muthoot Finance!
